mapper.select: /* wms-inbound-order-dlvr-sql-oracle.xml - selectObDtInfoList - 출고정보 조회 */ SELECT WBLNO , MAX(ICNM) AS ICNM FROM ( SELECT OH.WBLNO , MAX(IC.ICNM) AS ICNM FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH ON OD.CTKEY = OH.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = OH.OWKEY AND OD.OBHDKEY = OH.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON OD.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND OD.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY WHERE OD.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OD.EXTERNORDERKEY = #{externorderkey} AND OD.OBDTSTATUSCD IN ('65','70') -- 부분출고 , 출고완료 GROUP BY OH.WBLNO UNION ALL SELECT OL.WBLNO , '' AS ICNM FROM TWORK_INFO_ASIS_OB_LIST OL WHERE OL.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OL.EXTERNORDERKEY = #{externorderkey} GROUP BY OL.WBLNO ) OB GROUP BY WBLNO

/* wms-inbound-order-dlvr-sql-oracle.xml - selectHanjinDlvryOrderInsert - 반품운송장 접수 정보 조회 */ SELECT 'R' AS SVC_CAT_CD /* S:출고(자체출력), E:주문예약(한진 출력), R:반품예약, F:포커스 출력 */ , #{custordno} AS CUST_ORD_NO , #{wblno} AS WBLNO , A.CNTRCTNO AS CNTRACT_NO , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP + INTERVAL '1 days', 'YYYYMMDD') AS PICKUP_ASK_DT , #{recallerzipcd} AS SNDR_ZIP , pkg_crypto$decrypt(#{recalleraddr1},#{encKey}) AS SNDR_BASE_ADDR , pkg_crypto$decrypt(#{recalleraddr2},#{encKey}) AS SNDR_DTL_ADDR , pkg_crypto$decrypt(#{recallernm},#{encKey}) AS SNDR_NM , pkg_crypto$decrypt(#{recallertelno1},#{encKey}) AS SNDR_TEL_NO , pkg_crypto$decrypt(#{recallertelno2},#{encKey}) AS SNDR_MOBILE_NO , NULL AS SNDR_ASK_CNTENT , NULL AS SNDR_REF_CNTENT , C.ZIPCD AS RCVR_ZIP , C.ADDR1 AS RCVR_BASE_ADDR , C.ADDR2 AS RCVR_DTL_ADDR , C.CTNM AS RCVR_NM , C.TELNO AS RCVR_TEL_NO , NULL AS RCVR_MOBILE_NO , NULL AS RCVR_ASK_CNTENT , NULL AS RCVR_REF_CNTENT , 'CT' AS PAY_TYP_CD /* CD(발지신용), CT(착지신용), PP(선불), CC(착불) */ , 'S' AS BOX_TYP_CD /* 박스유형 S(~60cm), A(~80cm), B(~100cm), C(~120cm), D(~140cm), E(~160cm) */ , NULL AS PRINT_MEMO1 , NULL AS PRINT_MEMO2 , NULL AS PRINT_MEMO3 , NULL AS PRINT_MEMO4 , COALESCE(#{icnm}, '반품상품') AS COMODITY_NM FROM TWORK_MST_DLVRYCORP A INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CT C ON A.CTKEY = C.CTKEY WHERE A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.DLVRYCORPCD = #{dlvrycorpcd} AND A.DELYN = 'N'

/* wms-inbound-order-dlvr-sql-oracle.xml - selectIbDtInfoMap - 입고 상세 조회*/ SELECT OH.WBLNO , MAX(IC.ICNM) AS ICNM FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH ON OD.CTKEY = OH.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = OH.OWKEY AND OD.OBHDKEY = OH.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON OD.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND OD.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY WHERE OD.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OD.EXTERNORDERKEY = #{externorderkey} AND OD.OBDTSTATUSCD IN ('65','70') -- 부분출고 , 출고완료 GROUP BY OH.WBLNO
